subcodes.first_line: Praise, sanctified beyond all intimations and allusions of contingent things, befitteth Him Who is the Necessarily Existent, Who through a single word [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: حمد مقدس از دلالات و اشارات ممکنات واجب الوجودیرا لایق و سزاست که بیک کلمه
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @prayer for specific individuals; groups, @power of prayer, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution
